sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Mountain View Park Pond. Season: Open year around. Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish. Hours: Hours park is open to public use.

sources.title: Mountain View Pond- LY — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Mountain View Park Pond is about 4 feet deep and covers 1/3 of an acre... It is stocked with rainbow trout from Mason Valley Fish Hatchery that average about 9-inches. Most anglers use bait such as night crawlers, Power Bait, corn, or salmon eggs.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mountain View Park Pond
regulations.humanSummary: Mountain View Park Pond (Yerington, Lyon County) is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: No species-specific sub-limit is stated; limit applies to combined daily/possession total across all game fish species present (trout, catfish, bluegill).

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mountain View Park Pond
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 3 game fish; possession limit 6 game fish (all species combined) at Mountain View Park Pond.
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish.

parameters.note: NDOW's commission-regulation table lists hours as 'hours park is open to public use', with no fixed clock times; refer to City of Yerington park hours.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mountain View Park Pond
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is allowed during the hours the park is open to the public.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours: Hours park is open to public use.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
